_comment: Default / Fallback Building Bylaws — Conservative generic rules
_source: Conservative synthesis of common South Asian residential bylaws
_units: All distances in metres (m), areas in sq.m, percentages as numbers
_note: This file is used when no specific region is matched. Values are intentionally conservative (stricter than average) to prevent non-compliance. Replace with real local bylaws as soon as possible.

_notes: Conservative defaults — always within typical Indian municipal limits
If you know your region, specify it in the API request for accurate rules
Conservative defaults for small commercial buildings

parking.notes: 2 ECS per 100 sq.m commercial area assumed.
